output:
All four checks pass.

Implemented `_attach_deps` at `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py:143`: walks the open-ancestor stack innermost→outermost and returns `(parent, False)` for strict-form (parent at strictly lesser indent) or `(parent, True)` for lenient-form (parent at equal indent — caller should warn). No root-task fallback, since the task description doesn't specify one.

Added 7 unit tests in `TestAttachDeps` covering strict, lenient, innermost-wins, outdented walks, and the empty/no-match edge cases. Logged a NOTES.md entry flagging the chosen interpretation of "immediately preceding task line at strictly lesser indent" — the design doc grammar specifies only position, not indent rules, so the stack-walk reading is a judgment call worth surfacing.
